00021| function formatDate() {
00022|     const now = new Date();

00024|     return now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options);

00027| // ==================== TAB SWITCHING ====================
00028| 
00029| function setupTabSwitching() {
00030|     const navItems = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item');
00031|     
00032|     navItems.forEach(item => {
00033|         item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
00034|             e.preventDefault();
00035|             
00036|             const tabName = this.getAttribute('data-tab');
00037|             if (!tabName) return;
00038|             
00039|             if (tabName === currentTab) {
00040|                 return;
00041|             }
00042|             
00043|             navItems.forEach(nav => nav.classList.remove('active'));
00044|             this.classList.add('active');
00045|             
00046|             document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(pane => {
00047|                 pane.classList.remove('active');
00048|             });
00049|             
00050|             const tabPane = document.getElementById(`tab-${tabName}`);
00051|             if (tabPane) {
00052|                 tabPane.classList.add('active');
00053|             }
00054|             
00055|             currentTab = tabName;
00056|             
00057|             refreshTab(tabName);
00058|         });
00059|     });
00060| }
00061| 
00062| function refreshTab(tabName) {
00063|     switch(tabName) {
00064|         case 'dashboard':
00065|             refreshDashboard();

00067|         case 'cost':

00069|             break;

00081| async function fetchElectricityData() {

00085|         
00086|         if (!response.ok) {
00087|             throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
00088|         }
00089|         
00090|         const result = await response.json();
00091|         console.log('Electricity data received:', result);
00092|
